description_long: This object consists of three compact axes, each with a distinctively colored handle—black, dark gray, and red camo—arranged side by side. The handles are ergonomically curved with three circular holes for grip and weight reduction, and they appear to be made from a synthetic or composite material. The axe heads are robust, featuring a single broad cutting edge and a flat poll, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The blade is metallic and has a matte finish, contrasting with the vibrant or dark handles. The overall design is modern and tactical, likely intended for utility or emergency use in urban environments. No visible branding or markings are present on any of the axes.
description: A set of three modern, compact axes with colored ergonomic handles and broad metallic blades, designed for utility or emergency use. The handles feature grip holes and a curved shape for comfortable handling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three axes' colored handles and the broad metallic blades facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the axe heads and the curvature of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat polls of the axe heads and the full curvature of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade edges and the colored handles in profile.
attribute_handle_type: Curved ergonomic polymer handle with three circular grip holes, medium thickness, and a slightly contoured cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a straight cutting edge and a flat poll, no beard, and a modern tactical profile.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or integrated with the handle.
